nasb.text: Solomon left all the utensils unweighed, because they were too many; the weight of the bronze could not be ascertained.

esv.text: And Solomon left all the vessels unweighed, because there were so many of them; the weight of the bronze was not ascertained.

cnv.text: 這一切器皿所羅門都沒有稱算過；由於數量太多，銅的重量也無法估計。

ccb.text: 所罗门没有秤过这些器具，因为太多，铜的重量无法统计。
